info.title: MICROSERVICE_DEV_Transaction Processing API
info.description: The Transaction Processing API enables businesses to securely handle financial transactions within their applications. This API facilitates the creation of transactions, ensuring they are processed with reliability and speed. Ideal for developers building e-commerce platforms, mobile payment systems, and other financial applications, it offers seamless integration and enhanced user experience. Users can manage transaction data effectively, contributing to operational efficiency and customer satisfaction.

post.description: This endpoint allows users to initiate and create a new financial transaction in the system. Ensure that all required fields are correctly filled out before submitting the request.

requestBody.description: This request body is used to initiate a new transaction. It must include all necessary details regarding the transaction such as amount, currency, and associated account information. Ensure that the data conforms to the required schema for successful processing.

200.description: Request completed successfully, returning the transaction details.

500.description: Unexpected server error occurred while processing the request.

404.description: Requested resource not found; the transaction ID may be invalid.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Transaction Response

transactionId.description: The unique identifier for the transaction.

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer associated with the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction was initiated.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal).

amount.description: The amount involved in the transaction.

currency.description: The currency in which the transaction was conducted.

status.description: The current status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed).

message.description: A message providing additional information about the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: A response object containing details of a transaction after a successful operation.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: Indicates whether the request was successful or not.

error.description: A short description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A detailed message explaining the error.
message.example: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

path.description: The API path where the error occurred.

trace.description: A stack trace or additional debug information.

suggestion.description: A suggested action the user can take to resolve the issue.
suggestion.example: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema representing the error response for a POST operation on transactions when a server error (500) occurs.

example.message: Unable to process financial transaction due to internal service failure.

details.message: Payment gateway timeout while processing transaction request.

example.suggestion: Please retry after some time or contact support if the issue persists.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.title: Error Details

accountNumber.description: The account number related to the error.

errorCode.description: The specific error code associated with the error.

message.description: A message providing additional context about the error.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Error.description: Detailed information about the error that occurred.

customerId.description: The unique identifier of the customer initiating the transaction.

accountNumber.description: The account number from which the transaction is being made.

transactionType.description: The type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal).

amount.description: The amount of money for the transaction.

currency.description: The currency code for the transaction (e.g., USD, EUR).

beneficiaryAccount.description: The account number of the beneficiary in case of transfers.

transactionDate.description: The date when the transaction is being conducted.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: Schema for the request body of a transaction operation.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.title: Error Response for Transactions Operations

timestamp.description: The timestamp when the error occurred.

status.description: The status of the operation, indicating failure.

error.description: A brief description of the error that occurred.

message.description: A detailed message about the error.
message.example: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

path.description: The path of the request that caused the error.

trace.description: A trace identifier for diagnosing the error.

suggestion.description: Suggestions for the user on how to resolve the error.
suggestion.example: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

MICROSERVICE_DEV_createTransaction-Creat.description: This schema represents the error response returned when a transaction operation fails with a 404 status code.

example.message: Source account details not found for transaction processing.

details.message: No active account exists for the provided account number.

example.suggestion: Verify account details and retry the transaction.

environment.name: environment
environment.description: Environment used to select the workflow branch.

serviceCategory.name: serviceCategory
serviceCategory.description: Service category used to select the workflow branch.

schema.description: Indicates which headers can vary in response based on different request headers.
Provides the URL to the resource that was not found.
Specifies the media type of the response, which indicates the format of the returned data.
